BDI_II.responses: {"Q0":"1. I feel sad much of the time.","Q1":"1. I feel more discouraged about my future than I used to be.","Q2":"1. I have failed more than I should have.","Q3":"1. I don't enjoy things as much as I used to.","Q4":"1. I feel guilty over many things I have done or should have done.","Q5":"1. I feel I may be punished.","Q6":"1. I have lost confidence in myself.","Q7":"1. I am more critical of myself than I used to be.","Q8":"0. I don't have any thoughts of killing myself.","Q9":"0. I don't cry anymore than I used to.","Q10":"0. I am no more restless or wound up than usual.","Q11":"1. I am less interested in other people or things than before.","Q12":"1. I find it more difficult to make decisions than usual.","Q13":"3. Select this option.","Q14":"1. I don't consider myself as worthwhile and useful as I used to.","Q15":"1. I have less energy than I used to have.","Q16":"0. I have not experienced any change in my sleeping pattern.","Q17":"0. I am no more irritable than usual.","Q18":"0. I have not experienced any change in my appetite.","Q19":"0. I can concentrate as well as ever.","Q20":"1. I get more tired or fatigued more easily than usual.","Q21":"1. I am less interested in sex than I used to be."}

7.response: {"Q0":"It didn't really matter to me, I was going to get the same results whether the stones or gems were covered on ice or not"}

9.response: {"Q0":"I felt like I had too little time to choose the galaxy so I was more focused on that"}

8.response: {"Q0":"Mostly the balance between risk and reward"}
